name: Acid
notes: Throw at a target within 20 ft. DC 8 + Dex mod + Prof Bonus Dex save or take 2d6 Acid damage.

name: Alchemist's Fire
notes: Throw at a target within 20 ft. DC 8 + Dex mod + Prof Bonus Dex save or take 1d4 Fire damage and start burning.

name: Antitoxin
notes: Drink to gain Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Poisoned condition for 1 hour.

name: Backpack
notes: Holds up to 30 lb. within 1 cubic foot. Can also serve as a saddlebag.

name: Ball Bearings
notes: Spill to cover a level 10-ft.-square area within 10 ft. Creatures entering the area must succeed on DC 10 Dex save or fall Prone. Takes 10 minutes to recover.

name: Barrel
notes: Holds up to 40 gallons of liquid or 4 cubic feet of dry goods.

name: Basket
notes: Holds up to 40 lb. within 2 cubic feet.

name: Bedroll
notes: Sleeps one Small or Medium creature. Auto-succeed on saves against extreme cold.

name: Bell
notes: Produces a sound heard up to 60 feet away.

name: Blanket
notes: Advantage on saving throws against extreme cold while wrapped in it.

name: Block and Tackle
notes: Allows you to hoist up to four times the weight you can normally lift.

name: Book
notes: Consulting an accurate nonfiction Book about its topic gives +5 bonus to related Intelligence checks.

name: Bottle, Glass
notes: Holds up to 1½ pints.

name: Bright Fungal Cloak
notes: Furl or unfurl as a Bonus Action. When unfurled, sheds Bright Light 5 ft. and Dim Light a further 5 ft. Contains 1 lb. of edible fungus; when consumed, becomes mundane Traveler's Clothes.

name: Bucket
notes: Holds up to half a cubic foot.

name: Caltrops
notes: Spread to cover a 5-ft.-square area within 5 ft. Creatures entering must succeed on DC 15 Dex save or take 1 Piercing damage and have Speed reduced to 0 until the start of their next turn. Takes 10 minutes to recover.

name: Candle
notes: Burns for 1 hour. Sheds Bright Light in a 5-ft. radius and Dim Light for an additional 5 ft.

name: Case, Crossbow Bolt
notes: Holds up to 20 Bolts.

name: Case, Map or Scroll
notes: Holds up to 10 sheets of paper or 5 sheets of parchment.

name: Chain
notes: Wrap around a Grappled, Incapacitated, or Restrained creature within 5 ft. (DC 13 Str Athletics check). Bound legs impose the Restrained condition. DC 18 Dex (Acrobatics) to escape; DC 20 Str (Athletics) to burst.

name: Chest
notes: Holds up to 12 cubic feet.

name: Climber's Kit
notes: Anchor yourself; you can't fall more than 25 ft. from the anchor point or move more than 25 ft. from it without first undoing the anchor (a Bonus Action).

name: Clothes, Fine
notes: Required for entry at certain events and locations.

name: Clothes, Traveler's
notes: Resilient garments designed for travel.

name: Component Pouch
notes: Watertight; holds all free Material components for your spells. Can be used as a Spellcasting Focus.

name: Costume
notes: Advantage on ability checks to impersonate the person or type it represents.

name: Crowbar
notes: Gives Advantage on Strength checks where the crowbar's leverage can be applied.

name: Desert Clothing
notes: Auto-succeed on saving throws against extreme heat (when not wearing Medium or Heavy armor).

name: Devil Mask
notes: Other creatures have Disadvantage on Intelligence (Investigation) and Wisdom (Insight) checks to discern your identity or intentions while you wear it.

name: Flask
notes: Holds up to 1 pint.

name: Grappling Hook
notes: Throw at a railing, ledge, or catch within 50 ft. (DC 13 Dex Acrobatics check). With a Rope tied to it, you can climb it.

name: Healer's Kit
notes: 10 uses. Expend one use to stabilize an Unconscious creature at 0 HP without a Medicine check.

name: Holy Water
notes: Throw at a target within 20 ft. DC 8 + Dex mod + Prof Bonus Dex save or take 2d8 Radiant damage (Fiends and Undead only).

name: Hunting Trap
notes: Set on the ground. A creature stepping on it must succeed on DC 13 Dex save or take 1d4 Piercing damage and have Speed reduced to 0. DC 13 Str (Athletics) to free oneself (1 Piercing damage on each failed attempt).

name: Ink
notes: 1-ounce bottle; enough ink to write approximately 500 pages.

name: Ink Pen
notes: Used with Ink to write or draw.

name: Iron Pot
notes: Holds up to 1 gallon.

name: Iron Spikes (10)
notes: Hammer a spike into wood, earth, or similar material to jam a door shut or anchor a Rope or Chain.

name: Jug
notes: Holds up to 1 gallon.

name: Ladder (10 ft.)
notes: Must be climbed to move up or down.

name: Lamp
notes: Burns Oil. Sheds Bright Light in a 15-ft. radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 ft.

name: Lantern, Bullseye
notes: Burns Oil. Sheds Bright Light in a 60-ft. Cone and Dim Light for an additional 60 ft.

name: Lantern, Hooded
notes: Burns Oil. Sheds Bright Light in a 30-ft. radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 ft. Bonus Action to lower the hood (reduces to Dim Light in a 5-ft. radius) or raise it.

name: Lock
notes: Comes with a key. Without the key: DC 15 Dex (Sleight of Hand) with Thieves' Tools to pick.

name: Locking Spellbook
notes: 100-page leather-bound spellbook with a lock and key. DC 15 Dex (Sleight of Hand) with Thieves' Tools to pick the lock.

name: Magnifying Glass
notes: Advantage on checks to appraise or inspect detailed items. Can start a fire with bright light, tinder, and approximately 5 minutes.

name: Manacles
notes: Bind a Grappled, Incapacitated, or Restrained Small or Medium creature within 5 ft. (DC 13 Dex Sleight of Hand). Bound creature has Disadvantage on attacks; Restrained if chained to a fixed object. DC 20 Dex to escape; DC 25 Str to burst. Comes with a key; DC 15 to pick without it.

name: Map
notes: Consulting an accurate map gives +5 bonus to Wisdom (Survival) checks to navigate the area represented.

name: Mirror
notes: Handheld steel mirror. Useful for peeking around corners and reflecting light as a signal.

name: Monster Camouflage
notes: Resembles a specific Beast or Monstrosity. DC 10 Int (Investigation or Nature) check to see through it (Study action); auto-success within 30 ft. or if you act in ways the monster couldn't.

name: Net
notes: Throw at a creature within 15 ft. DC 8 + Dex mod + Prof Bonus Dex save or gain the Restrained condition. Auto-success if Huge or larger. DC 10 Str (Athletics) to escape. The Net can be destroyed (AC 10; 5 HP; immune to Bludgeoning, Poison, and Psychic).

name: Oil
notes: Douse a creature (DC 8 + Dex + Prof Bonus; deals 5 extra Fire damage on next fire hit within 1 minute), or pour on the ground (5-ft. square; burns for 2 rounds, 5 Fire damage per turn). Also fuels Lamps and Lanterns for 6 hours per flask.

name: Paper
notes: One sheet holds approximately 250 handwritten words.

name: Parchment
notes: One sheet holds approximately 250 handwritten words.

name: Perfume
notes: For 1 hour after applying, Advantage on Charisma (Persuasion) checks to influence an Indifferent Humanoid within 5 ft.

name: Poison, Basic
notes: Coat one weapon or up to 3 pieces of ammunition. A creature taking Piercing or Slashing damage from it also takes 1d4 Poison damage. Potency lasts 1 minute or until the damage is dealt.

name: Pole (10 ft.)
notes: Can touch something up to 10 ft. away. Can also be used to vault, giving Advantage on Strength (Athletics) checks for High or Long Jumps.

name: Potion of Healing
notes: Drink it or administer to a creature within 5 ft. That creature regains 2d4 + 2 Hit Points.

name: Pouch
notes: Holds up to 6 lb. within one-fifth of a cubic foot.

name: Quiver
notes: Holds up to 20 Arrows.

name: Ram, Portable
notes: Gives +4 bonus to Strength checks to break down doors. A second character helping gives Advantage on the check.

name: Rations (1 day)
notes: Travel-ready food: jerky, dried fruit, hardtack, and nuts.

name: Robe
notes: Ceremonial significance. Some locations admit only people wearing robes of certain colors or symbols.

name: Rope (50 ft.)
notes: Tie a knot (DC 10 Dex Sleight of Hand). Burst with DC 20 Str (Athletics). Bind an unwilling creature (must be Grappled, Incapacitated, or Restrained); bound legs impose the Restrained condition. DC 15 Dex (Acrobatics) to escape.

name: Sack
notes: Holds up to 30 lb. within 1 cubic foot.

name: Shovel
notes: Working for 1 hour, you can dig a 5-ft.-per-side hole in soil or similar material.

name: Signal Whistle
notes: Produces a sound heard up to 600 feet away.

name: Spell Scroll (Cantrip)
notes: If the cantrip is on your class's spell list, cast it without Material components. Spell save DC 13, attack bonus +5. Disintegrates after use.

name: Spell Scroll (Level 1)
notes: If the Level 1 spell is on your class's spell list, cast it without Material components. Spell save DC 13, attack bonus +5. Disintegrates after use.

name: Spellbook
notes: 100-page tome. Required for Wizards. Readable only by you or someone casting Identify.

name: Spyglass
notes: Objects viewed through it are magnified to twice their size.

name: String (10 ft.)
notes: Tie a knot in it.

name: Tent (2-person)
notes: Sleeps up to two Small or Medium creatures.

name: Tinderbox
notes: Holds flint, fire steel, and tinder. Bonus Action to light a Candle, Lamp, Lantern, or Torch. Lighting any other fire takes 1 minute.

name: Torch
notes: Burns for 1 hour. Sheds Bright Light in a 20-ft. radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 ft. Can be used as a Simple Melee weapon (deals 1 Fire damage on a hit).

name: Vial
notes: Holds up to 4 ounces.

name: Warm Fungal Clothing
notes: Auto-succeed on saving throws against extreme cold. Contains 1 lb. edible fungus; when consumed, becomes mundane Traveler's Clothes.

name: Waterskin
notes: Holds up to 4 pints. Weight given is when full.

name: Winter Camouflage
notes: In an appropriate snowy environment, Advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks while wearing it.
